title: fumaria rostellata
intro: Fumaria rostellata, also known as the spurred fumitory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fumariaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fumaria rostellata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Fumaria rostellata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with the tea being a common herbal preparation for its medicinal properties.
